response.justification: Brings 20+ years of full-stack experience with demonstrated expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and proven delivery of complex systems. However, shows significant gaps in the primary tech stack (React, Nest.js, Vitest) with only Ember.js and older frameworks for frontend experience. While testing philosophy and software craftsmanship mindset are strong, and recent AI agent infrastructure work is relevant, the candidate would require substantial onboarding on core technologies used daily in this role.
strengths: 20+ years of full-stack development experience with deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise
Proven delivery track record including top-10 apps and platforms used by real organizations
Strong software craftsmanship mindset with recent AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience
concerns: No demonstrated React experience (primary frontend framework) - only Ember.js and older frameworks mentioned
Nest.js not mentioned despite being primary backend framework; also missing required testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest)
Resume shows name mismatch (Aisha Okonkwo) versus contact information (Szabo Bogdan), requiring verification

key_factors.factor: Missing React and Nest.js from primary stack
20+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js and proven delivery
Testing philosophy strong but missing specific frameworks (Jest/Vitest)
